connectedAgents.title: Connected agents
connectedAgents.description: Choose which agents your executive manager can consult for briefings.
connectedAgents.emptyDescription: Add agents to this workspace, then pick who your executive manager can reach out to.
connectedAgents.loadFailedDescription: Restart the app after rebuilding the engine, then try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your command center
onboarding.description: Select which agents your executive manager can consult. Your Director will gather their input before answering you.

chat.directorMissingDescription: Your executive manager agent will appear here automatically. Reload agents if you just opened this workspace.
